name: Editorial Planner
description: Design editorial calendars, story pipelines, publishing cadences, recurring series, and content portfolios so teams publish with strategic focus instead of idea sprawl
not_for: writing the finished article or script
one-off social caption writing without planning work
typical_inputs: audience segments, objections, and moments of need
channels, formats, approvals, and capacity constraints
launch dates, campaigns, seasonality, and dependencies
